description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product Details Beige clutch with a flap with magnetic button closure Has a main compartment with an organizer pouch Beeding and wooden embellishments on the flap in front Material and Care 60% jute and 40% cotton Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 16 cm Width: 24 cm
